title: earnings-drilldown output
description: Canonical structured output for the earnings-drilldown skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered note) is described in references/rendering.md.

mode.description: lite skips implied_vs_realized; full includes all analyses

tier.description: Data fidelity: A=Benzinga+Stocks (full), B=Stocks-only (8-K proxy, reaction-sign bucketing), C=Free Basic (throttled)

tier_caveats.description: Human-readable caveats when tier < A. Empty array on Tier A.

session.description: Before market open, after market close, during market hours, or unknown

take.description: One-sentence trade-relevant conclusion, surfaced from the strongest signal in the analyses

implied_vs_realized.description: Null in lite mode. Populated in full mode.

straddle_pct.description: Raw front-week ATM straddle as decimal of spot. Provided for users who want the unadjusted number.

implied_move_pct.description: Industry-standard implied move = straddle_pct * 0.85 (CBOE/ORATS convention adjusting for convexity). This is the field to compare against realized_avg_pct.

realized_avg_pct.description: Average absolute next-day return over the last N prints

iv30_percentile_ttm.description: Percentile of IV30 vs trailing twelve months (0.0 to 1.0)

mispricing_pct.description: (implied - realized) / realized. Negative means implied below realized (cheap straddle). When abs > 1.0, the rendering layer switches to mispricing_pp for clarity.

mispricing_pp.description: Absolute percentage-point gap: implied - realized. Used in the rendered take when mispricing_pct exceeds ±100% (small realized denominator).

realized_16q_avg_pct.description: Optional 16-quarter realized average. Populated when the 16q figure differs materially from 8q (regime shift detection).

regime_shift_flag.description: True when |realized_16q_avg_pct - realized_avg_pct| > 0.01 (1pp). Signals that 8q may not represent the regime the options are pricing.

method_mix.description: Count of prints by eps_method (gaap vs adjusted) from Benzinga. Surfaces method-switches that would make comparisons inconsistent.

post_earnings_drift.description: T+1 to T+5 abnormal returns conditional on beat vs miss. Null if sample insufficient (n < 4).

peer_reaction.description: How sector peers traded same-day on this ticker's past prints. Null if no peers or insufficient sample.

peer_selection_method.description: Which method picked these peers. curated_override is primary for top-25 mega-caps; sic_fallback is last resort and noisier.

peers_used.description: The actual peer ticker list used in this analysis

top_peers.description: Peers with highest print-day beta to this ticker

catalysts.description: Curated watch items for the print, sourced from prior call commentary and the last 10-Q

universe_base_rate.description: M10: anchors this single-name print's drift / surprise / reaction metrics against a mega-cap universe distribution. Null when reason='not_implemented_yet' (live universe pull not yet wired into this skill) or 'live_universe_pull_disabled' (operator opted out). When populated, by_metric maps each metric name (post_announce_drift_t5_pct, avg_surprise_eps_pct, next_day_return_pct, etc.) to a base_rate block {n, median, mean, p25, p75}.

reason.description: Why the block is null. Forward-compatible: future revisions can wire the live pull and populate by_metric instead.

context.description: What this call provided (e.g. 'IV30 history', 'EPS actuals')
